div1.entryFree: Buttock, the hindmost part of the body, the backside: broad b. Ven. 298. his melting b. Ven. 298 a barber's chair that fits all --s, the pin-b., the quatch-b., the brawn-b., or any b. All's II, 2, 17. one that converses more with the b. of the night than with the forehead of the morning, Cor. II, 1, 56.*-- Plur. --s in the same sense: in what part of her body stands Ireland? in her --s, Err. III, 2, 120.
